title: James 2 and Vertrouwen report and flyers published
body: "Our accident investigation report on the collision between the fishing vessel Vertrouwen and the motor cruiser James 2, resulting in the sinking of James 2 with the loss of 3 lives in Sussex Bay on 6 August 2017 is now published.   The report, available via this link, contains details of what happened, subsequent actions taken and recommendations. This page also contains a short video about the investigation findings.   Safety flyers to the fishing vessel industry and sea angling community summarising the accident and detailing the safety lessons learned, have also been produced.   Media enquiries (telephone only)       Media enquiries during office hours 01932 440015   Media enquiries out of hours 0300 7777878      "
